prompt: Edit image 1 by applying the yellow/orange background gradient and blue text box style from image 5 to the panels. Use the font style from image 2 for the main text overlay. Place the gold balloon letters spelling "MEMES" from image 4, horizontally centered, directly above the top panel. Finally, add a miniature version of the brown top hat from image 3 onto Captain America's head in the bottom panel.
objects: Captain America (Chris Evans) in top panel
